_note: Dev quests for the Database Quest Board — coding tasks (mostly from ROADMAP.md) that others could pick up. Edit on github.com to add/remove. The 'data bounties' (unpriced items, unleveled mobs, unmapped zones, lost sources) are generated automatically from the live database and are NOT listed here. difficulty: 1 (easy) to 3 (hard).

quests.title: Auction price history & trends
quests.blurb: Chart an item's per-unit price over time from the live auction feed (auctions.json already carries per-listing timestamps and normalized per-unit prices). Show a sparkline on item pages and a 'biggest movers' board — now that real market data is flowing, this is the flagship analytics build.

quests.title: PvP ↔ PvE arbitrage board
quests.blurb: Surface the biggest cross-server price gaps — items far cheaper on one server than the other. The Auction House already prices PvP and PvE separately per item; this ranks the spreads.

quests.title: Rework the rarity × value scatter
quests.blurb: Rebuild the home rarity×value chart so it reads at a glance — add a legend, axis ticks, quadrant labels, and a shape (not just colour) for trade vs drop. The old code is left dormant in app.js (scatterSvg / wireScatter).

quests.title: Coin/hour & kills/hour analytics
quests.blurb: Use the ledger's per-event timestamps to show the real ROI of a farm spot — coin and kills per hour, broken down by zone and mob.

quests.title: Spawn-timer estimation
quests.blurb: Infer named-mob respawn windows from kill timestamps — rough when solo, sharp once crowdsourced.
